response.step_by_step_log: The song 'ないない' was identified from the on-screen text. A web search for '"ないない" song original artist' identified the original artist as ReoNa. A subsequent search for 'ReoNa ないない full lyrics japanese and english translation' provided the lyrics used in the response. The song is in Japanese, and the performer in the video is identified as the VTuber Roboco. The video was split into the performance section (00:00 - 02:04) and the post-performance dialogue section (02:04 - end).
response.global_summary: The video shows a 3-minute performance by the VTuber Roboco, featuring a single song, 'Nai Nai' by ReoNa. The performance includes high-quality 3D animations of the character dancing and singing in a virtual shrine-like environment. There is a dialogue interlude at the end where the character interacts with the audience.

scenes.description: The video starts with the song 'Nai Nai'. The title is shown in the top-left corner. The character Roboco performs a choreographed dance while singing.

scenes.description: The character finishes singing, and a dialogue interlude begins, where she speaks to the audience and discusses the song and her performance. The song 'Nai Nai' by ReoNa was identified using the title on-screen text, which was then confirmed with a search ('ないない song'). The lyrics were found using a search for ('ReoNa ないない full lyrics japanese and english translation'). The song is in Japanese.
The dialogue continues until the end of the video.
